ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batteries" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of the battery (e.g., Lithium-ion, Lead-acid) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the battery in Ah */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Nominal voltage of the battery in V */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the battery (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the battery */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the battery */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the battery */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Installation date of the battery */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Warranty expiry date of the battery */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the battery */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional information or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery being monitored */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was taken */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage measurement in V */,
  "soc" REAL /* State of charge in percentage */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the battery in Celsius */,
  "internal_resistance" REAL /* Internal resistance of the battery */,
  "current" REAL /* Current flowing through the battery */,
  "cycle_count" INTEGER /* Number of charge/discharge cycles */,
  "health_index" REAL /* Overall health index of the battery */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code reported by the battery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_metrics_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ic_commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., CONFIG, MODE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of what the command does */,
  "ic_model" TEXT /* Specific IC model the command is applicable to */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Last execution time of the command */,
  "execution_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of command execution in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery related to the configuration */,
  "register" TEXT /* Register address in HEX where configuration is applied */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value to set for the register */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "date_applied" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was applied */,
  "applied_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who applied the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_configs_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_configs_applied_by FOREIGN KEY ("applied_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ic_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IC version */,
  "ic_type" TEXT /* Type of the IC */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the IC */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional information or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., Engineer, Technician, Admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, view metrics) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery generating the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Warning, Critical) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the battery type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the battery type */,
  "chemistry" TEXT /* Chemistry of the battery type (e.g., Lithium-ion, Lead-acid) */,
  "max_capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the battery type in Ah */,
  "nominal_voltage" REAL /* Nominal voltage of the battery type in V */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commands_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command history entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the command sent */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery associated with the command */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Execution status of the command (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "command_output" TEXT /* Output or result of the command execution */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message generated during command execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_history_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_history_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES ic_commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery being monitored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the battery (e.g., Charging, Discharging) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status was recorded */,
  "remaining_capacity" REAL /* Remaining capacity of the battery in Ah */,
  "estimated_time_to_full" TEXT /* Estimated time to full charge or discharge */,
  "power_output" REAL /* Current power output of the battery in W */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_status_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., Monitoring, Alerting) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who updated the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_settings_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or component where the action was taken */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device connection */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device connected */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery being monitored */,
  "connection_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the connection event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the connection (e.g., Connected, Disconnected) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device connected (e.g., EV, Solar Panel) */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., Bluetooth, Wi-Fi) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_connections_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the battery model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the battery model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was released */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional information or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
